title: Confettinator
description: A block for dispensing confetti and fireworks with color configurable by redstone.
body: ## The Confettinator mod ![fabric api badge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7aa5a26a674baa26092eb1661393f4a4196a38b0.png) **The Confettinator mod adds one block—the Confettinator!** It works similarly to a dispenser, you can access its 9-slot inventory by right-clicking. It can be oriented in any of 4 directions, though it always shoots upwards. Unlike a dispenser, instead of choosing a random item, it uses the first item it finds in the inventory. When activated with redstone, it can shoot out: - Confetti (by giving a paper item) - Colored confetti (by giving any dye item) - Rainbow confetti (by giving a glowstone dust item) - Fireworks (like a regular dispenser) - Firework stars (like a firework but it immediately explodes) The Confettinator also has one special side for *redstone calibration*. It may be familiar to you if you've ever used a calibrated sculk sensor. When a redstone dust has power on the calibration side, it changes the color of any confetti (only as a paper item), firework, and firework star to the color corresponding to the redstone signal strength. (note: only one explosion is kept in each firework modified this way, and any fade color of any firework or firework star is removed) This mod uses [Confetti Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/confetti-lib) by Tomate0613. The source code of this project is available at https://github.com/Overgeneralized/confettinator.
